news_items.headline: Dodgers routed by Orioles, suffer first losing streak in over a month
news_items.summary: After five consecutive one-run games, the Dodgers on Sunday closed out the homestand with a literal one-run game on offense. Unfortunately for them, the Baltimore Orioles scored a dozen runs, romping through Los Angeles in a 12-1 victory. Emmet Sheehan allowed half of those 12 runs while recording only 10 outs. The big blows were […]

news_items.headline: Emmet Sheehan struggles in the haze in Dodgers' first consecutive loss since May
news_items.summary: Emmet Sheehan gives up six runs in 3 1/3 innings as the Dodgers lose in a rout to the Baltimore Orioles.
